source_evidence_placeholders.label: Submit Plans Online / Single PDF Process
SPP file naming standards and PDF preparation

workflows.upload_grouping_expectation: Drawings are grouped as one plans PDF; application forms, calculations, and supporting documents remain separate PDFs.
workflows.single_pdf_reference: Single PDF placeholder: drawing plan sheets together in one plans PDF; non-plan materials uploaded separately.
workflows.file_naming_reference: File naming placeholder: apply PP&D file naming standards before promotion to active requirements.

required_document_labels: Trade permit application or DevHub trade permit request
workflows.upload_grouping_expectation: Standard trade workflows may not require plan upload; trade-with-plan-review workflows keep plans separate from forms and schedules.
workflows.single_pdf_reference: Single PDF placeholder: only trade plan-review drawings belong in a consolidated plans PDF.
workflows.file_naming_reference: File naming placeholder: trade attachments use descriptive PP&D file naming before any active use.

required_document_labels: Structural or electrical supporting documentation when applicable
workflows.upload_grouping_expectation: Solar plan sheets are grouped as one plans PDF; equipment specifications and calculations are separate supporting PDFs.
workflows.single_pdf_reference: Single PDF placeholder: solar drawings grouped as a plan set while supporting documents remain separate.
workflows.file_naming_reference: File naming placeholder: solar plan and support files use PP&D file naming standards.

required_document_labels: Hazardous material or utility disconnect documentation when applicable
Neighborhood notice or delay documentation when applicable
workflows.upload_grouping_expectation: Demolition plans are grouped as plans; forms, notices, and utility or hazard documentation are uploaded as separate support PDFs.
workflows.single_pdf_reference: Single PDF placeholder: demolition drawing sheets grouped into one plans PDF where plan review applies.
workflows.file_naming_reference: File naming placeholder: demolition attachments follow PP&D file naming standards before active use.

required_document_labels: Site plan or mounting location documentation
workflows.upload_grouping_expectation: Sign drawings and elevations are grouped as the plan PDF; application and structural details are separate PDFs unless official guidance requires otherwise.
workflows.single_pdf_reference: Single PDF placeholder: sign drawing sheets grouped together as plans.
workflows.file_naming_reference: File naming placeholder: sign plan and support attachments follow PP&D file naming standards.

required_document_labels: Tree permit application or Urban Forestry request
Site plan or tree location plan
Replacement or mitigation documentation when applicable
workflows.upload_grouping_expectation: Tree location plans are kept distinct from arborist reports, mitigation documents, and application forms.
workflows.single_pdf_reference: Single PDF placeholder: if plan sheets are required, group plan sheets only; keep reports and forms separate.
workflows.file_naming_reference: File naming placeholder: Urban Forestry attachments use descriptive PP&D file naming before any active promotion.

required_document_labels: Clouded or marked revised sheets when applicable
workflows.upload_grouping_expectation: Revised drawings are grouped as the revised plans PDF; response letters and requested supporting documents are separate PDFs aligned to reviewer review groups.
workflows.single_pdf_reference: Single PDF placeholder: revised drawing sheets grouped together while response narrative remains separate.
workflows.file_naming_reference: File naming placeholder: correction uploads use PP&D file naming standards and revision labels before attended official upload.
